description.default: Single kill switch for the Copilot Agent Debug Logger. When true, the child flow (flow-1-log-agent-trace) and the tool flow (tool-log-agent-trace) write trace rows to cr_agenttrace. When false (default) or when this variable cannot be read, both flows exit gracefully without writing — the calling agent/flow continues unaffected (A4 fail-open). Topics never read this variable directly per D1 — the gate lives inside the flows only.

label.description: Single kill switch for the Copilot Agent Debug Logger. When true, the child flow (flow-1-log-agent-trace) and the tool flow (tool-log-agent-trace) write trace rows to cr_agenttrace. When false (default) or when this variable cannot be read, both flows exit gracefully without writing — the calling agent/flow continues unaffected (A4 fail-open). Topics never read this variable directly per D1 — the gate lives inside the flows only.
